Post a Job
app/hr/jobs/new/page.tsx
5-step employer form. Step 4 = Escrow setup (optional Solana integration — hackathon showcase). My Jobs tab.
EMPLOYER ONLY
Step 4: Escrow setup
On-chain proof of commitment
4
Architecture
app/hr/layout.tsx          ← employer gate (role !== 'employer' → redirect /)
app/hr/jobs/new/page.tsx
├── StepIndicator (1–5)
├── [step=1] DraftForm
├── [step=2] ParseJDStep
├── [step=3] ConfirmRequirementsStep
├── [step=4] EscrowSetupStep       ← NEW · Solana showcase
└── [step=5] PublishStep           ← shows escrow badge if funded

Tab: My Jobs
└── MyJobsTable → getMyJobs() · close/view pipeline actions
Escrow design note: In this step the employer sends SOL externally and pastes the txSignature back. Full tx construction is only in the pipeline (Page 6) for candidate payment release. This keeps step 4 buildable without requiring web3.js transaction deserialization.
